name: NBCC (India) Limited
summary: NBCC (India) Limited engages in project management consultancy and real estate development businesses in India and internationally. The company also provides engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) contracting services. Its Project Management Consultancy segment offers services for various civil construction projects, including residential and commercial complexes, re-development of colonies, hospitals, educational institutions, infrastructure works for security personnel, and border fencing projects, as well as infrastructure projects, such as roads, water supply systems, storm water drainage systems, water storage solutions, and solid waste management schemes. The company's EPC segment executes various projects, which include chimneys, cooling towers, coal handling plants, roads, bridges, flyovers, metro stations, metro elevated tracks, water and sewage treatment plants, solid waste management systems, TV towers, airports, runways, border fencing, etc. Its Real Estate Development segment develops residential, commercial, and institutional projects. The company is also involved in the provision of post-construction maintenance services; construction of harbors and electricity network; implementation of integrated steel plants; procurement, supply, installation, and commissioning of medical equipment; and environment and sustainability business. The company was formerly known as National Buildings Construction Corporation Limited and changed its name to NBCC (India) Limited in May 2016. NBCC (India) Limited was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in New Delhi, India.
